description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a pink and white exterior, featuring a flat roof and a rooftop terrace. The front facade includes a garage, a main entrance, and a small landscaped garden with a tree and shrubs. The house has a mix of large and small windows, with some arranged symmetrically and others more sporadically, providing ample natural light. The rear of the house is more private, with minimal windows and a large wooden double door. The side views reveal additional landscaping and a partially enclosed outdoor area. The overall design is clean and geometric, with a focus on functional outdoor spaces and contemporary aesthetics.
description: A modern two-story pink and white house with a flat roof, rooftop terrace, garage, and landscaped front garden. Features large windows, a wooden rear door, and a clean, geometric design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage, main entrance, landscaped garden, and a tree.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, rooftop terrace, and additional landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view with a large wooden double door and minimal windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing more garden space and the geometric layout.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with a mix of large and small windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single door, small porch, steps, and adjacent garage; landscaped with a tree and shrubs.
